Package me.itzloghotxd.nbt

Class AbstractTag<T>

java.lang.Object
me.itzloghotxd.nbt.AbstractTag<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The type of the value this tag holds
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Tag<T>
public abstract class AbstractTag<T> extends Object implements Tag<T>
An implementation of the Tag interface. This class handles the common storage and retrieval of the Tag's name and value, as well as standard equals, hashCode, and toString implementations.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
ItzLoghotXD
See Also:

    Constructs a new tag with the specified name and value.

    Constructs a new unnamed tag with the specified value.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractTag

      public AbstractTag(@Nullable @Nullable String name, @NotNull T value)
      Constructs a new tag with the specified name and value.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the tag, or null if unnamed
      value - The value of the tag, must not be null
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null

    • AbstractTag

      public AbstractTag(@NotNull T value)
      Constructs a new unnamed tag with the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - The value of the tag, must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getType

      @NotNull public abstract @NotNull TagType getType()
      Gets the type of this tag.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface Tag<T>
      Returns:
      The TagType of this tag

    • getName

      @Nullable public @Nullable String getName()
      Gets the name of this tag. In some contexts, like elements inside a ListTag, the name may be null.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface Tag<T>
      Returns:
      The name of the tag, or null if unnamed

    • setName

      public void setName(@Nullable @Nullable String name)
      Sets the name of this tag.
      Specified by:
      setName in interface Tag<T>
      Parameters:
      name - The new name for this tag, can be null

    • getValue

      @NotNull public T getValue()
      Gets the value stored in this tag.
      Specified by:
      getValue in interface Tag<T>
      Returns:
      The non-null value

    • setValue

      public void setValue(@NotNull T value)
      Sets the value of this tag.
      Specified by:
      setValue in interface Tag<T>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value, must not be null

    • serialize

      public abstract void serialize(@NotNull @NotNull DataOutput output) throws IOException
      Serializes this tag's payload to the specified output.
      Specified by:
      serialize in interface Tag<T>
      Parameters:
      output - The data output to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during writing

    • deserialize

      public abstract void deserialize(@NotNull @NotNull DataInput input) throws IOException
      Deserializes data from the specified input into this tag.
      Specified by:
      deserialize in interface Tag<T>
      Parameters:
      input - The data input to read from
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during reading

    • clone

      @NotNull public abstract @NotNull Tag<T> clone()
      Creates a deep copy of this tag.
      Specified by:
      clone in interface Tag<T>
      Returns:
      A new, independent tag instance containing the same data

    • toJson

      @NotNull public abstract @NotNull String toJson()
      Converts the tag and its contents into a JSON string representation.
      Specified by:
      toJson in interface Tag<T>
      Returns:
      A non-null JSON string

    • toString

      @NotNull public @NotNull String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this tag. Complex Tags like Compound, List, or Arrays Tag should override this to provide recursive string formatting.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String representation in format 'TAG_{TYPE}({NAME}):{VALUE}'.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Compares this tag to the specified object. The result is true if and only if the argument is not null and is a Tag object that has the same name, type, and value as this object.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - The object to compare this AbstractTag against
      Returns:
      true if the given object represents a Tag equivalent to this tag, false otherwise

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code for this tag. The hash code is computed based on the tag's name, type, and value.
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      A hash code value for this object
